name: gholdengo
flavor_texts: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.
It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession.
text: Gholdengo is the Coin Entity Pokémon. It is a steel and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: good-as-gold. Base stats — HP: 87, Attack: 60, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 133, Sp. Def: 91, Speed: 84. Evolution line: gimmighoul → gholdengo. Lore: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody. It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession.
